5f-pb-22.dose_note: Note: As with all research chemicals, start with a low dose, and work your way up.
5f-pb-22.name: 5f-pb-22

properties.dose: Threshold: 1mg Light: 1-3mg Common: 3-5mg Strong: 5-8mg. | Note: As with all research chemicals, start with a low dose, and work your way up.
properties.summary: Synthetic cannabinoid, agonist of the cannabinoid receptors which has a strong sedating aspect. The drug has a fast onset as common with synthetic cannabinoid.
